title: [Insurmountable]
description: Providing shade from the sun, a bright red awning stretches wide across the short wall where the wagon opens into the grounds.  Opposite the entry, a small window looks out over the rider's seat, its worn wooden frame allowing air to pass freely through the space.  Along the length of the wagon, several wall-mounted racks and floor-to-ceiling shelves line both walls, neatly holding two distinct styles of saddles, their leathers ranging from pale, sun-bleached tones to darker, oil-rich finishes.
